subcodes.first_line: O wise one! Wisdom is the fundamental basis of Prophethood, Apostleship, and the Manifestation of Divine Unity, for the temple of contingent existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حکیم حکمت اصل اساس نبوت و رسالت و ظهور مظاهر احدیت است چه که هیکل امکان
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @spiritual transformation, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar]
